name: simple-post-like
description: Add simple, intuitive reactions to your posts.
author: Faruk Ahmed <farukahmedinbox@gmail.com> (https://www.farukdesign.com)

scripts.package: npm run build && npm run pot && composer install --no-dev --optimize-autoloader && rm -rf ../simple-post-like-packaged && rm -f ../simple-post-like.zip && rsync -av --exclude-from='.distignore' . ../simple-post-like-packaged && cd .. && zip -r simple-post-like.zip simple-post-like-packaged && echo '✅ simple-post-like.zip ready for release!'
